prompt.goal: Student owner xem danh sách apply theo job; Accept/Reject chỉ Pending.
prompt.scope: - ForJob GET owner only - Accept/Reject POST - Views/Application/ForJob.cshtml
prompt.hardRules: - Chỉ owner job - Chỉ Pending mới Accept/Reject
prompt.acceptanceCriteria: - [ ] List đúng job - [ ] Accept → Status Accepted - [ ] Reject → Rejected - [ ] build pass
prompt.testPlan: 1. Student mở ForJob → thấy Pending 2. Accept → badge Accepted
